steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The blank introduces a noun phrase (title + name) that serves as the subject, positioned directly before the verb “found.”

steps.title: Apply the subject-verb rule
steps.content: No punctuation separates a subject from its verb. Option C correctly omits punctuation between the subject and verb, while options A, B, and D insert punctuation (a colon or commas) at this boundary. That matches choice C — C is correct.
